case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. NELVYNE SMITH et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED MAY-24-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, NELVYNE
DECLARATION SARAH A. ROBINSON-MCELROY FILED RE: CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033, INTEREST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, NELVYNE $2,399.29 PRINCIPAL, $188.60 INTEREST, $249.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,836.89, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, NELVYNE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $188.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, NELVYNE
